title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: psancheti6666/sotto
summary: Private, local voice dictation for macOS, Linux & Windows — hold a key, speak, and clean punctuated text lands at your cursor. 100% offline: on-device speech recognition + LLM cleanup. Free & MIT, $0 to run.

title: AashishH15/Lexicon
summary: A local-first, offline writing assistant. Grammar, rewriting & tone entirely on your machine.

title: chipi/agentic-ai-homelab
summary: How I work with agentic AI: personal patterns, homelab infra (vLLM, Ollama, Grafana Alloy, LibreChat), project scaffolding. Not best practices - what I run.

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: Cabbos/vllm-agent-gateway
summary: Multi-protocol OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, Gemini and Azure-compatible gateway for vLLM

title: Yan-ShiBo/LocalReadTranslate
summary: A privacy-first, fully local browser extension and backend to read aloud and translate selected text using Kokoro-82M TTS and Ollama.一个完全本地运行、注重隐私的划词听译扩展与服务。利用 Kokoro-82M 引擎进行高质量英文朗读，并由 Ollama 提供本地大模型翻译。

title: Praveenkumar101508/supracloud-ira
summary: Local-first personal AI assistant — chat, voice, memory, research, and actions on your own hardware. Fail-closed security gates, consent-gated external access, three-tier local model routing.

title: lidge-jun/opencodex
summary: Universal provider proxy for OpenAI Codex & Claude Code — use any LLM (Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Ollama…) with Codex CLI, App, SDK, and Claude Code

title: akshinmrv/Voxa
summary: Dub any video into another language and keep it in sync. Single-file Python CLI · 4 speech engines · 4 translators · no API key required · MIT

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: muhasin-code/paperlens
summary: Production-grade RAG system over AI/ML research papers - hybrid retrieval, fine-tuned extraction, observabilty, CI evaluation.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

title: bokiko/localist
summary: The local AI list that updates itself. Hardware-first guides for running AI on your own machine.

title: gonzaloMorenoc/Mnemo
summary: QA Continuity AI — a private, on-premise platform that turns scattered project knowledge (rules, flows, bugs, tests, CI) into test plans, Playwright automation, and searchable QA memory. 100% local LLMs via Ollama + HuggingFace, zero API cost.

title: Ocean82/smartshit
summary: AI-powered spreadsheet for budgets and expenses — chat instead of formulas. Local LLM via Ollama.

title: langchain4j/langchain4j
summary: LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

title: Jaival-Suthar/inference-lab
summary: Reproducible local LLM benchmarking with Ollama, TypeScript, SQLite, and GPU telemetry.

title: 1Panel-dev/1Panel
summary: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

title: kstevica/captain-claw
summary: Self-hosted framework for orchestrating fleets of specialist AI agents — ensemble reasoning and a full agentic coding pipeline, model-agnostic and local-friendly.
